recommendations.title: The Clink of Ice
recommendations.overview: An alcoholic writer is visited by an incarnation of his cancer.

recommendations.title: Too Beautiful for You
recommendations.overview: A car dealer, well-to-do and with a beautiful wife, finds himself attracted to his rather plain new temporary secretary. Despite her own commitments she feels the same and the two soon embark on an affair. Though it would seem it has happened before

recommendations.title: How Much Do You Love Me?
recommendations.overview: After winning the lottery, François goes to a bar in Pigalle and offers one hundred thousand Euros per month to a prostitute named Daniela to live with him as his wife until his money runs out.

recommendations.title: Femmes Fatales
recommendations.overview: Two men, fortyish, worn out by their wives, abandon everything to go and live in the back of beyond. There they meet a truculent priest, a boozer, Émile who recalls them to life's simple pleasures. Calm is what they want. But soon their example inspi

recommendations.title: Wide Load
recommendations.overview: This is the story of a guy who goes too fast and a big guy who is too slow. Foster meets Taupin. All this would be trivial if one of them had a scary scenario, the scenario of their lives and their deaths. Just open the pages and shake.

recommendations.title: Ménage

recommendations.title: Going Places
recommendations.overview: Two whimsical, aimless thugs harass and assault women, steal, murder, and alternately charm, fight, or sprint their way out of trouble. They take whatever the bourgeoisie holds dear, whether it’s cars, peace of mind, or daughters. Marie-Ange, a jaded

recommendations.title: Get Out Your Handkerchiefs
recommendations.overview: Solange is seriously depressed, and her kindhearted husband, Raoul, makes it his mission to cure her doldrums. After many failed attempts to cheer her up, Raoul hits upon a possible solution: find his wife a lover. Unfortunately, his choice, Stéphane

recommendations.title: Actors
recommendations.overview: Les Acteurs is the absurd story of Jean-Pierre Marielle desperately waiting for a cup of hot water, the story of a conspiracy against actors, the story of aging actors whose careers are slowly less active than they used to be, but a stunning tribute

recommendations.title: Boys Don't Cry
recommendations.overview: A young aspiring violinist unwittingly becomes involved with a criminal gang.
